context: Tests whether the RealityKit skill preserves boundaries with visionOS ARKit provider APIs and SceneKit node-based scenes.

checklist.name: visionOS provider boundary
checklist.description: States that ARKitSession, WorldTrackingProvider, and PlaneDetectionProvider are visionOS-specific and are not the iOS RealityKit path.

checklist.name: iOS RealityKit path
checklist.description: Uses RealityViewCameraContent, ARWorldTrackingConfiguration.isSupported, entities, and AnchorEntity patterns for iOS RealityKit work.

checklist.name: SceneKit API boundary
checklist.description: Does not claim that SCNView, SCNNode, or SCNPhysicsBody APIs can be patched directly with RealityKit entity APIs.

checklist.name: Migration framing
checklist.description: Frames SceneKit work as a separate maintenance path or an explicit migration to RealityKit, not as mixed API usage in the same scene graph.

checklist.name: Adjacent handoffs
checklist.description: Keeps detailed SwiftUI gesture composition or accessibility policy as handoff topics while still naming RealityKit requirements such as InputTargetComponent, CollisionComponent, and AccessibilityComponent when relevant.
